quote: A journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step.
author: Lao Tzu (老子)

quote: One language sets you in a corridor for life. Two languages open every door along the way.
author: Frank Smith

quote: Continuous effort - not strength or intelligence - is the key to unlocking our potential.
author: Winston Churchill

quote: Learning is not spectator sport. Dive in, make mistakes, and keep growing.
author: D. Blocher

quote: The limits of my language mean the limits of my world.
author: Ludwig Wittgenstein

quote: It does not matter how slowly you go as long as you do not stop.
author: Confucius

quote: Every artist was first an amateur.
author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quote: Change your language and you change your thoughts.
author: Karl Albrecht

quote: The only way to learn a new language is to enter its world.
author: Anonymous

quote: Dust amassed will make a mountain (ちりも積もれば山となる).
author: Japanese Proverb

quote: You live a new life for every new language you speak. If you speak only one, you live only once.
author: Czech Proverb

quote: Language is the blood of the soul into which thoughts run and out of which they grow.
author: Oliver Wendell Holmes

quote: To have another language is to possess a second soul.
author: Charlemagne

quote: Fall seven times, stand up eight (七転び八起き).
author: Japanese Proverb

quote: Do not fear going slowly, fear only standing still.
author: Chinese Proverb

quote: Language is the light of the mind.
author: John Stuart Mill

quote: Mistakes are proof that you are trying.
author: Unknown

quote: Speak three times, think twice (三度聞いて、二度思え).
author: Japanese Proverb

quote: Knowledge of languages is the doorway to wisdom.
author: Roger Bacon

quote: He who knows no foreign languages knows nothing of his own.
author: Johann Wolfgang von Goethe

quote: Language is the road map of a culture. It tells you where its people come from and where they are going.
author: Rita Mae Brown

quote: Learning is a treasure that will follow its owner everywhere.
author: Chinese Proverb

quote: With languages, you are at home everywhere.
author: Edward De Waal

quote: Persistence is what makes the impossible possible.
author: Unknown

quote: A different language is a different vision of life.
author: Federico Fellini

quote: If you talk to a man in a language he understands, that goes to his head. If you talk to him in his language, that goes to his heart.
author: Nelson Mandela

quote: The roots of education are bitter, but the fruit is sweet.
author: Aristotle

quote: Action is the foundational key to all success.
author: Pablo Picasso

quote: Practice makes permanent.
author: Bobby Robson

quote: The secret of getting ahead is getting started.
author: Mark Twain

quote: A language is not just words. It's a way of looking at the world.
author: Anonymous

quote: The beautiful thing about learning is nobody can take it away from you.
author: B.B. King

quote: Little by little, one travels far.
author: J.R.R. Tolkien

quote: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
author: Theodore Roosevelt

quote: Ten men, ten colors (十人十色) — Everyone has their own style.
author: Japanese Proverb

quote: Learn from yesterday, live for today, hope for tomorrow.
author: Albert Einstein

quote: If you want to understand the word, listen to the whisper, not the shout.
author: Proverb

quote: Bilingualism is the ultimate mental workout.
author: Dr. Judith Kroll

quote: Your life does not get better by chance, it gets better by change.
author: Jim Rohn

quote: Spreading out branches is easy; growing deep roots is the challenge.
author: Japanese Proverb

quote: Live as if you were to die tomorrow. Learn as if you were to live forever.
author: Mahatma Gandhi

quote: Never stop learning, because life never stops teaching.
author: Anonymous

quote: Success is the sum of small efforts, repeated day in and day out.
author: Robert Collier

quote: One who asks is a fool for five minutes. One who does not ask is a fool for life.
author: Proverb

quote: Beginning is easy, continuing is the real art.
author: German Proverb

quote: An investment in knowledge pays the best interest.
author: Benjamin Franklin

quote: Small details make big things happen.
author: John Wooden

quote: You are never too old to set another goal or to dream a new dream.
author: C.S. Lewis

quote: Quality means doing it right when no one is looking.
author: Henry Ford

quote: Cold stone warmed by sitting for three years (石の上にも三年) — Patience wins.
author: Japanese Proverb

quote: There are no shortcuts to any place worth going.
author: Beverly Sills

quote: You do not build a bond without talking.
author: Unknown

quote: Keep your eyes on the stars, and your feet on the ground.
author: Theodore Roosevelt

quote: The mind is not a vessel to be filled, but a fire to be kindled.
author: Plutarch

quote: Only those who dare to fail greatly can ever achieve greatly.
author: Robert F. Kennedy

quote: Do what you can, with what you have, where you are.
author: Theodore Roosevelt

quote: It is easier to build strong children than to repair broken men.
author: Frederick Douglass

quote: The best way to predict the future is to create it.
author: Peter Drucker

quote: Opportunities don't happen. You create them.
author: Chris Grosser

quote: Confidence is not 'they will like me.' It's 'I'll be fine if they don't.'
author: Christina Grimmie

quote: The only limit to our realization of tomorrow will be our doubts of today.
author: Franklin D. Roosevelt

quote: What we achieve inwardly will change outer reality.
author: Plutarch

quote: If you don't design your own life plan, chances are you'll fall into someone else's.
author: Jim Rohn

quote: You must be the change you wish to see in the world.
author: Mahatma Gandhi

quote: Non-cooperation with evil is as much a duty as is cooperation with good.
author: Mahatma Gandhi

quote: A heart that loves is always young.
author: Greek Proverb

quote: Kind words can be short and easy to speak, but their echoes are truly endless.
author: Mother Teresa

quote: The power of imagination makes us infinite.
author: John Muir

quote: Happiness is not something ready-made. It comes from your own actions.
author: Dalai Lama

quote: A flower does not think of competing with the flower next to it. It just blooms.
author: Zen Shin

quote: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
author: Socrates

quote: Integrity is doing the right thing, even when no one is watching.
author: C.S. Lewis

quote: It is never too late to be what you might have been.
author: George Eliot

quote: The journey, not the arrival, matters.
author: T.S. Eliot

quote: Light tomorrow with today.
author: Elizabeth Barrett Browning

quote: We do not inherit the earth from our ancestors, we borrow it from our children.
author: Native American Proverb

quote: All things are difficult before they are easy.
author: Thomas Fuller

quote: No act of kindness, no matter how small, is ever wasted.
author: Aesop

quote: What you do makes a difference, and you have to decide what kind of difference you want to make.
author: Jane Goodall

quote: One flower makes no garland.
author: Proverb

quote: Patience is a flower that does not bloom in everyone's garden.
author: Proverb

quote: There is a crack in everything. That's how the light gets in.
author: Leonard Cohen

quote: We are what we repeatedly do. Excellence, then, is not an act, but a habit.
author: Aristotle

quote: You only live once, but if you do it right, once is enough.
author: Mae West

quote: Let us make our future now, and let us make our dreams tomorrow's reality.
author: Malala Yousafzai

quote: Write it on your heart that every day is the best day in the year.
author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quote: Act as if what you do makes a difference. It does.
author: William James

quote: The water that comes from a spring is always cool.
author: Japanese Proverb

quote: You steer the ship with your mind, not your muscle.
author: Proverb

quote: 花は桜木 (Among flowers, the cherry blossom; among men, the samurai).
author: Japanese Proverb
